{{Infobox concept
| name = Iron body
| introduced = cradle-01-unsouled
}}

''See also: [[Iron body Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|An [[Iron]] body represents a significant quantitative advancement in physical capability, elevating an individual to superhuman status compared to those at the [[Copper]] level or below. Achieving this stage involves a refining process that expels impurities from the body, though the transformation can be a violent and painful experience where toxins or black matter are purged through the skin. There are various specialized types of [[Iron]] bodies that practitioners can train for or acquire, each offering distinct advantages. For instance, the [[Steelborn body]] provides immense physical strength, while the Bloodforged variety is highly effective at resisting poisons and diseases by utilizing [[madra]] to facilitate rapid healing. Other variations include the Moonheart body, which can decouple a person's consciousness from physical trauma to maintain mental control, the [[Raindrop body]] for improved agility and reaction speeds, the Silverscale body for spiritual resistance, and the Mountainroot body for increased stability and weight. While an [[Iron]] body grants enhanced durability, speed, and regenerative abilities, it requires the consumption of [[madra]] to function effectively. Users must carefully manage their energy reserves, as specialized functions—such as healing severe wounds or maintaining extreme physical feats—can rapidly deplete their supply.}}

== Unsouled ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Kelsa]] is close to condensing her [[Iron body]].<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c2">''Unsouled'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Yerin]] possesses the speed of an [[Iron body]].<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c19">''Unsouled'', chapter 19</ref>}}

== Soulsmith ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[The Iron]] body is a physical attribute or stage that occurs when a [[sacred artist]] advances to the [[Iron stage]]. To prepare for this transition, serious practitioners undergo rigorous body training before advancing. Once achieved, this trait allows an individual to rapidly heal injuries into scars. However, those who possess an [[Iron]] body often lose sight of the fragility inherent in those without one. [[Lindon]] is an example of a practitioner who possesses this body.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Iron body]] is a trait or effect that comes with the [[Iron stage]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c2">''Soulsmith'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|An [[Iron body]] is a physical attribute or stage.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c8">''Soulsmith'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|Those with [[Iron]] bodies tend to forget the fragility of those without.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c10">''Soulsmith'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|The [[Iron body]] allows for rapid healing of injuries into scars.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c13">''Soulsmith'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|Serious [[sacred artists]] train their bodies before advancing to [[Iron]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c16">''Soulsmith'', chapter 16</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Lindon]] has an [[Iron body]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c17">''Soulsmith'', chapter 17</ref>}}

== Skysworn ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|An [[Iron body]] provides robustness against heat.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c1">''Skysworn'', chapter 1</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Lindon]] has an [[Iron body]] that can heal his eyes using [[madra]].<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c17">''Skysworn'', chapter 17</ref>}}

== Underlord ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|A [[Highgold]] girl has an [[Iron body]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c3">''Underlord'', chapter 3</ref>}}

== Uncrowned ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|The [[Iron body]] is suited for fighting off venom and disease.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c19">''Uncrowned'', chapter 19</ref>}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Pride]]'s [[Iron body]] makes it almost impossible for him to bleed to death.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c14">''Wintersteel'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Yerin]]'s [[madra]] goes to her [[Iron body]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c17">''Wintersteel'', chapter 17</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Lindon]] relies on his [[Iron body]] for healing.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c19">''Wintersteel'', chapter 19</ref>}}

== Bloodline ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Kelsa]] reversed her [[Iron body]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c8">''Bloodline'', chapter 8</ref>}}

== Reaper ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Jaran]] has an [[Iron body]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c5">''Reaper'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|A man on the third floor of a tower has an [[Iron body]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c8">''Reaper'', chapter 8</ref>}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]]'s [[Iron body]] did not handle the wounds he received during his technique.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c19">''Waybound'', chapter 19</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:Unsouled]]
[[Category:Soulsmith]]
[[Category:Skysworn]]
[[Category:Underlord]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle concepts]]
[[Category:Terminology]]
